analytics.title: Extension usage analytics
analytics.description: When enabled, anonymous usage statistics are collected to help improve the extension. No personal information is sent.

bookmarks.title: Access to browser bookmarks
bookmarks.description: When enabled, the extension only accesses your browser bookmarks to display them inside Widgetify. Nothing is stored or transmitted; bookmarks are shown only in the extension.

tabs.title: Access to tabs
tabs.description: When enabled, the extension can open and manage bookmarks inside folders in bulk. No personal information is stored or transmitted.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: Widgetify shortcuts for faster, more comfortable use.

items.open_bookmark_new_tab: Open a bookmark in a new tab
items.open_bookmark_middle_click: Open a bookmark in a new tab with the middle mouse button
items.open_all_bookmarks: Open all bookmarks in a folder

wallpapers.uploadPrompt: Click to upload from your device

coin.unlockHint: Unlock this wallpaper with Widget Coins and keep it forever!
coin.earnHint: Earn Widget Coins by completing activities and inviting friends.
